title: Training Budget and Professional Development Request Process
text:
Q: How can I request funding for training or professional development?
A: Employees can request funding for training and professional development through the company's Training Budget Request Form, which is available on the HR intranet. To initiate a request, complete the form and submit it to your direct supervisor for approval. Once approved, your supervisor will forward the request to the HR department. Please submit your request at least 30 days prior to the training date to allow for processing. The HR team will review all requests on a quarterly basis, and you will receive a response within two weeks of submission. If you have questions about the process or need assistance, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
